source_note: Hand-verified against the actual DRHP text in prospectus.txt (Draft Red Herring Prospectus, Dated: September 30, 2025 - a pre-IPO draft, price band not yet set). All amounts in ₹ lakhs unless noted. Every figure below was independently located in prospectus.txt via grep/read from the 'Summary Derived from the Restated Financial Information' and 'Objects of the Issue' sections, not taken from any prior LLM extraction output.

financial_metrics._note_on_margin_denominator: No separate 'Total Income' line is disclosed in the retrieved text - margin above is PAT/Revenue from Operations.
financial_metrics._note_on_nulls: Valuation ratios (P/E, P/B, EV/EBITDA) are not computable pre-price-band. ROE/current ratio/debt-to-equity were not located as explicitly-stated computed values in the retrieved text - treated as unverifiable rather than guessed.

use_of_funds_inr_lakh.purpose: Funding incremental working capital requirements of our Company
Repayment/pre-payment, in full or in part, of certain outstanding borrowings availed by Our Company from scheduled commercial banks

use_of_funds_inr_lakh.note: capped at 25% of Gross Proceeds; exact amount undisclosed pending Issue Price determination

business_facts.business_model: B2B, serving dealers, showrooms, and family jewellers
business_facts.manufacturing_facility_location: A-5, Jamna Lal Bajaj Marg, C-Scheme, Jaipur, Rajasthan
business_facts.negative_operating_cash_flow: Negative net cash flow from operating activities in FY2023, FY2024 and FY2025 (Rs -277.35, -1,049.33, -3,697.69 lakh respectively) due to working-capital-intensive nature of the business
